notes: This module mathematically binds authorship to the original artifact saved locally.
Used to prove origin if authorship is ever challenged.

steps: Compute SHA-256 of the saved artifact on your phone.
Compute SHA-256 of the metadata block (author, timestamp, location).
Concatenate both hashes and hash again to get combined_hash_hex.
Store combined_hash_hex in both this module and your Captain's Log.

procedure: Compare with origin_hash stored here and in Captain's Log.
If they match, authorship and integrity are proven.

policies: Origin hash must never be altered once inscribed.
Any change to the artifact requires a new Proof-of-Origin entry.
Authorship remains bound to 'Leif William Sogge' for this lineage.
